query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletter_subscribers WHERE unsubscribed = 0) as active_subscribers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM newsletter_subscribers) as total_subscribers,
  (SELECT SUM(subscriber_count) FROM subscriber_lists) as sum_of_list_counts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM list_subscribers) as total_list_memberships
